# ClientOnly

A utility component that only renders its children on the client side, after hydration. Useful for components that rely on browser APIs or are incompatible with server-side rendering.

## Import

```jsx
import { ClientOnly } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `fallback` | `ReactNode` | - | Content to render during SSR and before client hydration. |

## Usage

### Basic Client-Only Rendering

```jsx
<ClientOnly>
  <BrowserOnlyWidget />
</ClientOnly>
```

### With Fallback

```jsx
<ClientOnly fallback={<Skeleton height="200px" />}>
  <InteractiveChart data={chartData} />
</ClientOnly>
```

### For Browser API Dependent Components

```jsx
<ClientOnly fallback={<Text>Loading map...</Text>}>
  <MapComponent center={coordinates} />
</ClientOnly>
```
